claims.statement: CipherVault uses SQLite via sqlite-jdbc for its database layer.

relations.description: CipherVault uses SQLite for its database layer.
CipherVault uses sqlite-jdbc to access SQLite.
sqlite-jdbc is used as the driver for SQLite.
